title: Status repeating each group of item
excerpt:
I am creating several different group of items for different work groups under one table. 
I have realized that when I create status column that applies to other group of items as well. Also, when I add one different lab…

posts.author: sumeyye.aydin (sumeyye aydin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating several different group of items for different work groups under one table.

I have realized that when I create status column that applies to other group of items as well. Also, when I add one different label for status, it applies to other group of items as well. How can I assign different status column for each group of items.

You can see in the picture. If I create status2 column for the first group of items, it will apply to second one as well. Please, help me out for this issue. How can I handle with this?

Screen Shot 2020-10-05 at 11.05.35 AM514×998 23.6 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@sumeyye.aydin,

Groups are primarily used to, literally, group items. Columns, status labels, etc. are all applied at the board level. There is no flexibility there. From what you’ve described so far, I would consider using separate boards instead of groups.
